generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) placed on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder attached to the motor shaft to measure angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox to provide position reference."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataStream
]

instance AngularPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Dedicated angular position sensor integrated with the gearwheel."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAngularVelocityDataStream
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction data transmitted via MQTT
instance MotorCurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor, SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

instance DerivedAccelerationDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor, SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

// C5: Data sources
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded current I_M of the motor, streamed via MQTT with timestamps."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamer
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position of the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamer
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position behind the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamer
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataStream
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ) computed locally from current and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataStream
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) computed locally."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataStream
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration computed locally."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationDataStream
]

// C10: Engineering and simulation models
instance MotorSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeler
]

instance GearboxSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Inter‑component Diagram of the gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor with Coulomb‑Viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearwheel with Stribeck friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the cycloidal gearbox with Dahl friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used in the motor simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

instance FrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Stribeck friction model used in the gearwheel simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

instance FrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Dahl friction model used in the cycloidal gearbox simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

instance FrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box LuGre friction model used for advanced friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkExecutable
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling and infrastructure)
instance SysMLModeler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling environment for structural and functional design."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDiagnosticDashboardService, FrictionModelComparisonService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkExecutable : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing simulation and parameter estimation."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelComparisonService, ParameterEstimationService, FrictionAugmentedMotionModelService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker streaming real‑time sensor data with timestamps and metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDiagnosticDashboardService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing context and metadata for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDiagnosticDashboardService
]

instance DataDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard aggregating measured and simulated data for operator visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDiagnosticDashboardService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDiagnosticDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service visualising real‑time measured and simulated data of the rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDiagnosticInsight, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionModelComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing white‑box and black‑box friction models to identify evolution."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDiagnosticInsight
]

instance ParameterEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous parameter estimation to update simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionAugmentedMotionModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering friction‑augmented motion models for improved robot accuracy."
]

// C17: Insights and Actions
instance FrictionLossDiagnosticInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic insight into friction loss and its evolution derived from model comparison."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated parameter update action informed by continuous identification results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation – data are acquired and processed continuously while the robot is running, with streaming rate defined by the sensor sampling (typically milliseconds to seconds, not explicitly quantified)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated set consisting of the physical robot first axis, MQTT‑based sensor data pipeline, a processing component that consumes data traces, executes the simulation models, and produces derived traces, and a visualization dashboard that presents the comparative data to users"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (engineering structural and simulation models) → Operated (continuous identification during robot operation); the DT covers the manufactured and operated states of the first robot axis"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Multi‑physics‑aware continuous identification of friction parameters, traceability of data traces back to sources and models, comparison of measured vs simulated data, and use of both white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven models to validate and refine the twin"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming time‑series data from the robot controller to the digital shadow; the Asset Administration Shell connects asset metadata to data traces"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for model‑based systems engineering, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as an industrial standard for digital twins, and adherence to MBSE methodologies such as RFLP, OOSEM, and SPES in the development process"
]
